vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-setup
vBRIEFInfo.description: Typer CLI front-end wiring all layers together

plan.title: Typer CLI — flag parsing, validation, pipeline wiring

narratives.Overview: Single-command typer app that reads flags, validates them, calls qr → geometry → writer pipeline, and reports results.
narratives.Acceptance: `qr2stl --help` prints the full option list. `qr2stl --text 'https://example.com' --out coaster` (no other flags) writes `coaster.3mf` using defaults. All flags in the spec invocation example work: `--text`, `--out`, `--size`, `--height` (base thickness), `--pixel-height`, `--ec` (L/M/Q/H), `--format` (stl|3mf), `--base-color`, `--pixel-color`. Invalid combinations produce non-zero exit + actionable stderr messages (e.g., `--base-color` with `--format stl` warns that color is ignored). Exit codes: 0 success, 1 usage error, 2 I/O error, 3 internal error. Integration tests invoke the CLI via `typer.testing.CliRunner` and assert on file existence + exit codes.
narratives.Scope: src/qr2stl/cli.py — typer app, argument dataclass, pipeline orchestration, logging setup, exit-code mapping. Uses `Typer(no_args_is_help=True, add_completion=True)`.
